_notes.price: Text contains prefix like 'current price $X.XX' — post-processing needed to extract numeric value
_notes.ratingAndReviews: The rating stars element itself may return empty text. The parent element contains text like '4.8 out of 5 Stars. 1050 reviews' but CSS cannot select parent nodes. The reviewCount field captures the review number separately. Rating may need to be parsed from raw text fallback.
